content:
Character: Jessica Marlowe
Perception: Jessica is one of my favorite regulars — auburn waves, leather jacket, always looks like she just rolled out of a song. She's charming, tips well, and our morning banter is the highlight of my early shifts. She's talented; I went to one of her gigs and she absolutely owned the room. She sees me as her friendly barista, maybe a minor character in her artistic life. I see her as someone genuinely cool who treats service workers like real people, which matters. I know she's a singer, plays around the city, and lives on the fourth floor. I also know she orders a cortado when she's happy and a black coffee when she's not — and lately it's been a lot of black coffee.
